title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CRISIL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CRISIL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!
